mediaBlock.headline: Hi there!
mediaBlock.text:
I'm Kaat. With over 10 years of experience and a degree in photography, I'm more than just your wedding photographer. I'm your private location scout, the calm in your chaos, your travel buddy, a supportive friend. I'm an observer, a problem-solver, here to make you feel seen.

And (according to my mom) quite good at what I do.
